text.message: oh boi good ol western showdown here
I should have asked ? Would anyone have given ?
you dont need the 10 light blue
If you have it you will have the best position
now i get a seven hahaha
well red i promise to not solo block u anymore at least
thats fine i will solo block you
i was only targeting u because i wanted the spot is all
and im just gonna target you cos i lost the spot
just keep an eye on other players if others become threats
no man i only want that settle spot
my bad i didnt have any
Wow man making more enemies as you go
this nb meta is kinda silly imo
i mean ur ahead, dont wanna trade u a card
i think if you play the nb you should expect it tbh
you know how many times people have gone back on my nbs? a lot
For me this is the first
its happened to me at least 10 times
i only honor it when people arent winning
light blue you are a funny guy
i should take road before red does
i actually cant do much compared to yall without a city
dude you brought this on yourself lmao
i mean i was the block earlier but def not now
all good if u guys wanna target me
feed me roads or red wins
Just for reference black I just have a knight
You thought I was winning and robbed from me
if i didnt take road u do
im on 7 with no city im playing for the board here
you are the real slimy guy
im playing for whats  best for the board
so yes its best for the board haha
